lesson.menu_title: Plans for the Weekend -- Talking About the Future (going to)
lesson.menu_desc: Talk about your plans: I am going to relax. Are you going to travel? New words: plan, going to, tomorrow, beach, picnic, invite, maybe, together -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Plans for the Weekend: Talking About the Future (going to)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 16 -- Plans for the Weekend

listenings.text: Hello. Let me tell you about my plans for next weekend. On Saturday, I am going to relax at home. In the morning, I am going to read a book. In the afternoon, my daughter is going to visit me. We are going to have lunch together. On Sunday, the weather is going to be sunny, so we are going to go to the beach. Maybe we are going to have a small picnic. I am very happy. It is going to be a special weekend.

Hi. I want to tell you about my plans for tomorrow. Tomorrow is Saturday. In the morning, I am going to invite my friends to my house. We are going to watch a movie together. In the afternoon, I am not going to work. I am going to rest. On Sunday, the weather is going to be cold, so I am going to stay at home. Maybe I am going to cook a nice meal. It is going to be a calm weekend, and that is good for me.

extra_audio.text: First, my friend asks: What are you going to do this weekend? Second, I answer: I am going to relax at home. Third, my friend asks: Are you going to go out? Fourth, I answer: Maybe. I am going to go to the beach. Fifth, my friend says: Nice. Have a good weekend.
